items.imageAlt: Long Tranh Hổ Đấu Festival — 9XACLY announcement
items.heading: 9XACLY
paragraphs: 9xacly (official pronunciation: "chinh-xac-ly") is a hardcore punk band formed in 2022 with five members: Tòng (vocal), Thái (drums), Hardy (guitar), Vui Qá (bass), plus the unexpected return of Chuột Sấm Xét as guitarist — adding a whole new edge to this event.

In 2023, they released their debut album "Chính Xác Ly." Through that record, the band dominated stages from South to North, with "1000 Điều Ước" and "Siết Lấy Nó" standing out as key tracks. Building on that momentum, 9xacly dropped their next single in 2025, titled "REAL DEAL." Their music is raw, direct, and uncompromising, with lyrics that reflect frustration and the darker sides of life — true to the hardcore punk spirit they always pursue.
items.location: MH Studio — 327 Trần Xuân Soạn, Tân Kiểng, District 7, Ho Chi Minh City

items.imageAlt: Long Tranh Hổ Đấu Festival — Volcate special guest announcement
items.heading: SPECIAL GUEST “VOLCATE”
paragraphs: It feels far away, but not too far! The third special guest, Volcate, is flying in from the land of the red maple to Saigon, returning to Vietnam to appear at Long Tranh Hổ Đấu Festival as a warrior for the Tiger faction this year.

According to Volcate, the band members are currently international students and workers in Toronto, Canada. Formed in 2025, Volcate made their stage debut with the single "Life Trap," followed by the 8-track album "VSTYLE." The release helped them make noise in hardcore communities both in Vietnam and abroad. Volcate’s sound is rooted in "boy phố" street culture, blended with hip-hop elements and beatdown hardcore.
items.location: MH Studio — 327 Trần Xuân Soạn, Tân Kiểng, District 7, Ho Chi Minh City

items.imageAlt: Long Tranh Hổ Đấu Festival — Empathize announcement
items.heading: EMPATHIZE
paragraphs: The fresh new voice in Saigon’s core scene — Empathize officially storms Long Tranh Hổ Đấu Festival! With a raw, rugged style and a fierce metallic hardcore sound, they are set to bring wild energy to the Tiger faction arena this time around!
items.location: MH Studio — 327 Trần Xuân Soạn, Tân Kiểng, District 7, Ho Chi Minh City

items.imageAlt: Long Tranh Hổ Đấu Festival — 18.18 announcement
paragraphs: Founded in 2023, 18.18 has made a name in recent years as a pop-punk/indie rock band. Across three years on the road, the group has stood out with songs such as Khùng, Mãi Mãi In My Mind, Hey Girl and Ảo Ảnh Anime, and is one of the young standouts in today’s indie/punk scene.
items.location: MH Studio — 327 Trần Xuân Soạn, Tân Kiểng, District 7, Ho Chi Minh City

1.question: When is the festival?
1.answer: The event runs over two days with two distinct experiences. Gate times and the full schedule will be updated on this website.

2.question: Where can I buy tickets?
2.answer: Tickets are sold officially on the festival website. Buy only from official sources to protect your purchase.

3.question: How do I receive my tickets after payment?
3.answer: E-tickets will be emailed within 48 hours of successful payment. Please check your inbox.

4.question: What if I don't receive my tickets by email?
4.answer: Check spam and other folders. If you still don't see them, contact us via the official fan page or hotline.

5.question: Can I refund or exchange my tickets?
5.answer: Paid tickets are non-refundable and non-exchangeable unless the organizer cancels the event.

6.question: Is there an age limit?
6.answer: The event is intended for ages 16+. Under 16 must attend with a guardian.

meta.where: 327 Tran Xuan Soan, Tan Kieng, District 7, Ho Chi Minh City

purchase.tierRule: (You can only select tickets within the same tier)

vip: Free-flow beer (unlimited) during two golden windows

terms.1: Paid tickets are non-refundable and non-exchangeable.
terms.2: Tickets are valid only for the date and tier purchased.
terms.3: Attendees are responsible for keeping tickets safe after purchase.
terms.4: Lost, damaged, or fraudulently copied tickets cannot be replaced.
terms.5: The organizer is not responsible for tickets bought from unofficial sources.
terms.6: The organizer may refuse entry for violations of event rules.
terms.7: If the event is cancelled, a separate ticket policy will be announced.
